sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75390" key="o)rtugokopi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρτῠγοκοπ-ία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n75390.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the game of quail-striking,</tr_> ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
